I'll call BS on your claim of paying $14K on a taxable income of $45K. The 2015 federal tax table shows for a taxable income of $45K for married filing jointly is $5831 and if you filed married separately it would be $7050. This is based on the actual taxable income after deductions. If you really did pay as much as you claim you did, you may want to file an amended return.
